# Cyber Security

Established 2021

[Faculty](/departments/cyber-security/faculty)[Apply Now](/admissions)

## Vision & Mission

### Vision

To be a leading center for cyber security education and research, protecting digital infrastructure.

### Mission

* Provide comprehensive education in cyber security and information assurance
* Foster research in network security, cryptography, and ethical hacking
* Develop skilled security professionals with ethical standards
* Build partnerships with government and private security agencies

## Programs Offered

### B.E. Cyber Security

Duration: 4 yearsIntake: 60

## Labs & Facilities

### Laboratories

* Cyber Security Lab
* Network Security Lab
* Cryptography Lab
* Ethical Hacking Lab
* Forensics Lab
* Malware Analysis Lab
